---
name: Blueprint Request
about: Request a new agent or spaceship blueprint
title: '[Blueprint] '
labels: blueprint
assignees: ''
---

**Blueprint type**
- [ ] Agent (individual AI worker)
- [ ] Spaceship (team/orchestrator)

**Name**
What should this blueprint be called?

**Industry / Use case**
What business, creative, or personal workflow does it serve?

**Agents needed** (for spaceship blueprints)
What agents should be on the crew? List roles and responsibilities.

**Tools / Integrations**
What external tools should the agents connect to? (e.g. Gmail, social media, analytics)
